title: dysoxylum laxiracemosum
intro: Dysoxylum laxiracemosum, also known as the 'Kadukkai' or 'Kadukka', is a type of medicinal plant that belongs to the family Meliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dysoxylum laxiracemosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and processed into a powder or paste, which can be used to make traditional remedies such as kadukkai chutney or kadukkai tea.
